name: mesh-teapot
description: Mesh-to-field: Utah teapot STL (6,320 tris) imports via the sdf-grid pipeline (normalize -> BVH-signed 96^3 distance grid -> atlas bricks) and renders the actual teapot. Loud-throws if the atom doesn't route to atlasBaked. Captures wait for the 192^3 background grid refine to complete (deterministic sharpened baselines, 2026-06-12).

commands: (() => { const s = window.__canaryGetEvalSnapshot(); const reps = (s && s.atomDispatch && s.atomDispatch.byActiveRep) || {}; if (!reps.atlasBaked) { throw new Error('mesh import did NOT route to atlasBaked; byActiveRep=' + JSON.stringify(reps)); } return 'mesh routed to atlas: ' + JSON.stringify(reps); })()

new Promise(function(resolve, reject){ var t0 = Date.now(); (function poll(){ try { if (window.__canaryForceMarkDirty) window.__canaryForceMarkDirty('refine-poll'); var l = window.__canaryGetRenderLoopState && window.__canaryGetRenderLoopState(); var gr = l && l.gridRefine; if (gr && gr.state === 'done') { resolve('grid refine done: ' + JSON.stringify(gr)); return; } if (Date.now() - t0 > 120000) { reject(new Error('grid refine never completed within 120s; gridRefine=' + JSON.stringify(gr))); return; } setTimeout(poll, 150); } catch (e) { reject(e instanceof Error ? e : new Error(String(e))); } })(); })
